hooks.command: git status --porcelain -- noodle/ | grep -q . && ! git status --porcelain -- CHANGELOG.md | grep -q . && echo "{\"decision\":\"block\",\"reason\":\"noodle/ source changed but CHANGELOG.md was not updated. Add an entry under [Unreleased] before finishing.\"}" || echo "{}"

git diff --quiet && git diff --cached --quiet && exit 0; python -c 'import noodle' || exit 0; python -m pytest tests/ -x -q || exit 0; git add -A && git commit -m "auto: build and smoke tests passing [$(date +%Y-%m-%d)]" && git push
hooks.statusMessage: Checking build + smoke tests before auto-commit...
